editorial_note: Covers Nature publication of Azalea Therapeutics' in vivo CAR-T approach using EDV/AAV two-vector system for permanent TRAC locus integration. Contextualizes within broader in vivo CAR-T landscape.

related_articles.context: MagicRNA Biotech's competing in vivo CAR-T approach using lipid nanoparticles for autoimmune disease — directly compared in this article
Related gene therapy delivery advance addressing immune toxicity in non-viral DNA insertion
